'''F'la Ren''' was a blue-white primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[F'tral system/Legends|F'la Ren system]].

{{Star-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] spells the star "F'laRen," as one word.

==Appearances==
